description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 16 hrs 32 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Java (53%), with additional time in Other (28%) and Markdown (18%). He had activity across 5 projects.
